title: lyroglossa euglossa
intro: Lyroglossa euglossa, also known as Euglossa bee orchid, is a type of orchid plant that is pollinated by male Euglossini bees, which are known to collect fragrances from flowers to create their own perfume. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lyroglossa euglossa include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and aid in the recovery from respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in aromatherapy to take advantage of its fragrance.
